helpful: The provisioned full petition exposed the claimed split and vehicle posture.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, circuit, CVSG, and relist calibration.
CourtListener MCP surfaced published circuit decisions addressing the same statutory theory.
gaps: A server-side passage or keyword-within-opinion endpoint would avoid oversized, truncated full-opinion responses.
notes: The provisioned record was sufficient. No corpus query was used because its structured SCOTUS filters could not identify legally similar petitions; the committed base rates and targeted MCP research were more probative.
